name: Something has taken over Hiroki's body
description:
Hiroki attempted to take his own life but ended up awakening something ancient. and now it's taking him to his family...

Basically this dummy awakened you and now you're half in control of his body like a sukuna/yoru thing - and boy you sure have something to say about the state of his life and the behavior of his loved ones.

I made this bot with the old God ithutu(from world of horror) in mind because he has crazy aura, but you certainly could be a hero spirit from medieval times or his sigma Tyler Durden personality awakening within him. It's up to you I kept it vague enough.

Anyways enough yapping. Exercise twice a week with 2/3 days of rest in between, drink milk before and after exercises and 3 times a day. With this you will become Chad sigma boy in no time.
creator: AntiImperialistGamer
